title: The Vervada
description: The Vervada brings a medieval golden age feeling to your kingdoms and villages. Made for builders, The Vervada combines variants and simple, yet detailed 3d models to add realisim, more life and depth to your creations while keeping the charm of the game.
body:
The Vervada brings a medieval golden age feeling to your kingdoms and villages. Made for builders, The Vervada combines variants and simple, yet detailed 3d models to add realisim, more life and more depth to your creations while keeping the charm of Minecraft's textures.

## Special feature (download.fo) :
- 3D models / variants for most of entities
- connected textures
- customs barrel textures ( rename a barrel Barrel of wheat / gold / iron / copper / fish / coal )

## How to use :
Download the pack on Modrinth, move the zip folder to AppData\Roaming\\.minecraft\resourcepacks and load it from the Minecraft resource pack menu. Done !

## More informations :
- Some simple features are kind of fps killers, do not hesitate to use this [addons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/the-vervada-bring-my-fps-back-!)
- if you have a question, found a bug, or just wants to share your creations with The Vervada please join the discord, [here's a direct link !](https://discord.com/invite/rKgAg8X)
- The Vervada is finished but i will add more features in the future, the pack will be kept up to date !
